domain: learning curves / scaling laws (power-law emergence threshold)
specific_mechanism: tool-use accuracy ~ compute^γ with γ = 0.18 ± 0.05 across model families, threshold at 10^22 FLOPs
llm_application: specific scaling law for tool-use emergence in LLMs
novelty_claim: specific γ=0.18 exponent universal across model families — testable
